# Daily Report ‚Äî 2026-06-07

## Task Completed
Added user group membership management tools: `list_user_groups`, `get_user_group`,
`add_user_to_group`, `remove_user_from_group`, and `list_group_members`.

New file `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/user_group_tools.py` covers:
- `list_user_groups` ‚Äî paginated listing of `sys_user_group` with name/manager/active/query filters
- `get_user_group` ‚Äî fetch a group by sys_id or exact name with 404 guard
- `add_user_to_group` ‚Äî POST a `sys_user_grmember` junction record; resolves group and user from name/sys_id
- `remove_user_from_group` ‚Äî DELETE a `sys_user_grmember` record by its member sys_id
- `list_group_members` ‚Äî paginated member listing for a group (sys_id or name lookup)

All tools use the shared helpers pattern (`_get_instance_url`, `_get_headers`, `_build_sysparm_params`,
`_paginated_list_response`, `_join_query_parts`, `_make_request`, `_format_http_error`).
Reference fields (manager, parent, user, group) are normalised to display values.

Registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, and `tool_packages.yaml` (service_desk,
system_administrator, full packages).

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1481
- New tests: 56
- Coverage: 92% overall; user_group_tools.py 96%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing infrastructure advisories (setuptools, urllib3, pyjwt, wheel) ‚Äî none introduced
by today's changes.
